Home/Counties/Pasco County FHA Loans
Pasco County FHA Loans

FHA loans in Pasco County, Florida

FHA loans across Pasco County with as little as 3.5% down. Here's the county's 2026 FHA loan limit, why this fast-growing Tampa Bay county is so FHA-friendly, and how to get pre-approved.

Pasco County Home Loans

FHA loans in Pasco County, Florida

Pasco County is one of the Tampa Bay area's biggest growth stories, with master-planned communities and new construction pouring into Wesley Chapel, Land O' Lakes, and beyond. That abundance of new, reasonably priced homes makes it a prime FHA market — the loan limit covers most homes, and new construction breezes through the FHA appraisal. For buyers priced out of Tampa proper, Pasco is often the answer.

Pasco County FHA limit (1-unit)$541,287

2026 single-family

Minimum down3.5%

With a 580+ score

Min credit score580

500–579 with 10% down

Property types1–4 units

Owner-occupied

What the FHA limit means in Pasco County

With the 2026 FHA floor of $541,287 and FHA's 3.5% minimum down, you can finance a Pasco County home priced up to roughly $560,000 (your loan covers the price minus your down payment). In Pasco's new-construction-heavy market, that covers the vast majority of homes. A handful of Florida counties are set higher, so we confirm Pasco County's exact figure with HUD.

New construction and growth in Pasco County

Pasco is practically built for FHA buyers: modern homes that meet FHA standards at prices within the loan limit, perfect for first-time buyers and Tampa commuters. The county mixes booming east-side communities (Wesley Chapel) with more established west-side cities (New Port Richey). Pair FHA with Florida assistance and gift funds, and get pre-approved before you compete for homes.

Communities We Serve

FHA loans across Pasco County

We help FHA buyers throughout Pasco County, including Wesley Chapel, New Port Richey, Land O' Lakes, Zephyrhills, and Dade City. For a closer look at the local market, loan limits, and down payment help, explore our city guide(s):

Wesley Chapel

Down payment help in Pasco County

You don't have to cover the down payment alone. FHA allows gift funds, sellers can contribute up to 6% toward closing costs, and Pasco County buyers can often pair FHA with assistance from the Florida Housing Finance Corporation and Pasco County's local SHIP-funded programs. Funding and eligibility change frequently, so we'll help you confirm what's currently available — see our FHA down payment assistance guide.

Questions & Answers

Frequently asked questions

What is the FHA loan limit in Pasco County for 2026?+
Pasco County is at the 2026 Florida FHA floor of $541,287, which covers nearly all homes in the county. Confirm the exact figure with HUD's official lookup.
Is Pasco County good for FHA buyers?+
Very — its abundant new construction at prices within the FHA limit makes it one of Tampa Bay's friendliest FHA markets.
Does FHA work for new-construction homes in Pasco County?+
Yes — newer homes typically pass the FHA appraisal easily and sit within the loan limit.
How much down payment do I need in Pasco County?+
As little as 3.5% with a 580+ score, reduced with gift funds and Florida assistance.
Do you serve all of Pasco County?+
Yes — Wesley Chapel, New Port Richey, Land O' Lakes, Zephyrhills, Dade City, and every community in the county.
